properties.name: Select board
properties.description: Analyst clicks a board name in the sidebar list.

properties.name: Fetch board bytes
properties.description: Frontend issues GET /api/v1/boards/:name to read the .excalidraw file from disk.

properties.name: Validate scene shape
properties.description: Server parses JSON and confirms the scene contains an elements array.

properties.name: Mount Excalidraw canvas
properties.description: Web app instantiates the Excalidraw editor with the returned scene.

properties.name: Subscribe to board WS channel
properties.description: Client opens WS subscription to board:<name> for live change events.

properties.name: Edit elements on canvas
properties.description: Analyst draws, moves, edits, or deletes elements in the Excalidraw editor.

properties.name: Trigger save
properties.description: Save is invoked via Cmd/Ctrl-S or autosave debounce.

properties.name: PUT board scene
properties.description: Frontend sends PUT /api/v1/boards/:name with the new scene JSON.

properties.name: Atomic write to disk
properties.description: Server writes <name>.tmp then renames to <name>.excalidraw and recomputes content hash.

properties.name: Broadcast board.changed
properties.description: Server emits WS board.changed so other tabs reload.
